results.question: How many patients do we have?
results.sql: SELECT count(id) FROM patients

results.question: List all doctors and their specializations
results.sql: SELECT name, specialization FROM doctors

results.question: Show me appointments for last month
results.sql: SELECT * FROM appointments WHERE appointment_date BETWEEN DATE('now', 'start of month', '-1 month') AND DATE('now', 'start of month', '-1 day')

results.question: Which doctor has the most appointments?
results.sql:
SELECT
  d.name
FROM doctors AS d
JOIN appointments AS a
  ON d.id = a.doctor_id
GROUP BY
  d.id,
  d.name
ORDER BY
  COUNT(a.id) DESC
LIMIT 1

results.question: What is the total revenue?
results.sql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM invoices

results.question: Show revenue by doctor
results.sql:
SELECT
  d.name AS doctor_name,
  SUM(t.cost) AS total_revenue
FROM doctors AS d
JOIN appointments AS a
  ON d.id = a.doctor_id
JOIN treatments AS t
  ON a.id = t.appointment_id
GROUP BY
  d.id,
  d.name
ORDER BY
  total_revenue DESC

results.question: How many cancelled appointments last quarter?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM appointments WHERE status = 'Cancelled' AND appointment_date >= DATE(STRFTIME('%Y', 'now') || '-' || CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%m', 'now') BETWEEN '01' AND '03' THEN '01' WHEN STRFTIME('%m', 'now') BETWEEN '04' AND '06' THEN '04' WHEN STRFTIME('%m', 'now') BETWEEN '07' AND '09' THEN '07' ELSE '10' END || '-01', '-3 months') AND appointment_date < DATE(STRFTIME('%Y', 'now') || '-' || CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%m', 'now') BETWEEN '01' AND '03' THEN '01' WHEN STRFTIME('%m', 'now') BETWEEN '04' AND '06' THEN '04' WHEN STRFTIME('%m', 'now') BETWEEN '07' AND '09' THEN '07' ELSE '10' END || '-01')

results.question: Top 5 patients by spending
results.sql:
SELECT
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  SUM(i.total_amount) AS total_spending
FROM patients AS p
JOIN invoices AS i
  ON p.id = i.patient_id
GROUP BY
  p.id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name
ORDER BY
  total_spending DESC
LIMIT 5

results.question: Average treatment cost by specialization
results.sql: SELECT d.specialization, AVG(t.cost) FROM doctors AS d JOIN appointments AS a ON d.id = a.doctor_id JOIN treatments AS t ON a.id = t.appointment_id GROUP BY d.specialization

results.question: Show monthly appointment count for the past 6 months
results.sql:
SELECT
  strftime('%Y-%m', appointment_date) AS appointment_month,
  COUNT(id) AS appointment_count
FROM appointments
WHERE
  appointment_date >= DATE('now', '-6 months')
GROUP BY
  appointment_month
ORDER BY
  appointment_month

results.question: Which city has the most patients?
results.sql: SELECT city FROM patients GROUP BY city ORDER BY COUNT(id) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: List patients who visited more than 3 times
results.sql:
SELECT
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name
FROM patients AS p
JOIN appointments AS a
  ON p.id = a.patient_id
GROUP BY
  p.id
HAVING
  COUNT(a.id) > 3

results.question: Show unpaid invoices
results.sql: SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE status = 'unpaid'

results.question: What percentage of appointments are no-shows?
results.sql:
SELECT
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'no-show' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(id)
FROM appointments
columns: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'no-show' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(id)

results.question: Show the busiest day of the week for appointments
results.sql:
SELECT
  CASE strftime('%w', appointment_date)
    WHEN '0' THEN 'Sunday'
    WHEN '1' THEN 'Monday'
    WHEN '2' THEN 'Tuesday'
    WHEN '3' THEN 'Wednesday'
    WHEN '4' THEN 'Thursday'
    WHEN '5' THEN 'Friday'
    WHEN '6' THEN 'Saturday'
  END AS day_of_week,
  COUNT(id) AS total_appointments
FROM appointments
GROUP BY
  day_of_week
ORDER BY
  total_appointments DESC
LIMIT 1

results.question: Revenue trend by month
results.sql:
SELECT
  STRFTIME('%Y-%m', invoice_date) AS sales_month,
  SUM(total_amount) AS monthly_revenue
FROM invoices
GROUP BY
  sales_month
ORDER BY
  sales_month

results.question: Average appointment duration by doctor
results.sql:
SELECT
  d.name AS doctor_name,
  AVG(t.duration_minutes) AS average_appointment_duration_minutes
FROM doctors AS d
JOIN appointments AS a
  ON d.id = a.doctor_id
JOIN treatments AS t
  ON a.id = t.appointment_id
GROUP BY
  d.name

results.question: List patients with overdue invoices
results.sql: SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name, p.email, i.invoice_date, i.total_amount, i.paid_amount, i.status FROM patients AS p JOIN invoices AS i ON p.id = i.patient_id WHERE i.status = 'Overdue' AND i.total_amount > i.paid_amount

results.question: Compare revenue between departments
results.sql:
SELECT
  d.department,
  SUM(t.cost) AS total_revenue
FROM treatments AS t
JOIN appointments AS a
  ON t.appointment_id = a.id
JOIN doctors AS d
  ON a.doctor_id = d.id
GROUP BY
  d.department
ORDER BY
  total_revenue DESC

results.question: Show patient registration trend by month
results.sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', registered_date) AS registration_month, COUNT(id) AS patient_count FROM patients GROUP BY registration_month ORDER BY registration_month
